.claude/worktrees/agent-a8a04fab8dc8fd48e/docs/technical/us/one-man-army.md:29:    27|What if Feature B waits 3 minutes to acquire the physical lock on `main.go`, but `main.go` has already been drastically changed by Feature A? **The large model's `Edit/Replace` tool is naturally foolproof.** It must match specific code snippet context (`oldString`) before making modifications. If Feature A changed this code, when Feature B acquires the lock and attempts the replacement, the underlying system will directly throw an error: `Error: target string not found`. Upon receiving the error, the large model is **forced to re-`Read` this file**, thereby refreshing its mental context! This is a "blessing in disguise."
.claude/worktrees/agent-a8a04fab8dc8fd48e/docs/technical/us/analysis-emotion-and-cog-load.md:36:    34|Every time AI outputs something, you are uncertain: Is this true? Is this complete? Are there errors I have not found? Did it do something I do not know about?
.claude/worktrees/agent-a8a04fab8dc8fd48e/docs/technical/cn/one-man-army.md:22:    20|### 🛡️ 第二道防线：编辑工具的“天然免疫力” (Stale Context Rejection)如果 Feature B 等了 3 分钟才拿到 `main.go` 的物理锁，此时 `main.go` 已经被 Feature A 改得面目全非了怎么办？**大模型的 `Edit/Replace` 工具是天然防呆的。** 它在修改前必须匹配具体的代码片段上下文（`oldString`）。如果 Feature A 改了这段代码，Feature B 在拿到锁执行替换时，底层会直接抛出错误：`Error: target string not found`。大模型收到报错后，会**被迫重新 `Read` 这个文件**，从而刷新它脑子里的上下文！这是一种”因祸得福”。

.claude/worktrees/agent-a70d7592f5ce7020e/docs/technical/us/one-man-army.md:29:    27|What if Feature B waits 3 minutes to acquire the physical lock on `main.go`, but `main.go` has already been drastically changed by Feature A? **The large model's `Edit/Replace` tool is naturally foolproof.** It must match specific code snippet context (`oldString`) before making modifications. If Feature A changed this code, when Feature B acquires the lock and attempts the replacement, the underlying system will directly throw an error: `Error: target string not found`. Upon receiving the error, the large model is **forced to re-`Read` this file**, thereby refreshing its mental context! This is a "blessing in disguise."
.claude/worktrees/agent-a70d7592f5ce7020e/docs/dogfooding/cn/dogfood-cross-platform-windows.md:16:- **F2.8**: 4 个 Stop hook 用相对路径 → Stop 事件触发时 CWD 漂移 → `No such file`

.claude/worktrees/agent-a70d7592f5ce7020e/docs/technical/cn/one-man-army.md:22:    20|### 🛡️ 第二道防线：编辑工具的“天然免疫力” (Stale Context Rejection)如果 Feature B 等了 3 分钟才拿到 `main.go` 的物理锁，此时 `main.go` 已经被 Feature A 改得面目全非了怎么办？**大模型的 `Edit/Replace` 工具是天然防呆的。** 它在修改前必须匹配具体的代码片段上下文（`oldString`）。如果 Feature A 改了这段代码，Feature B 在拿到锁执行替换时，底层会直接抛出错误：`Error: target string not found`。大模型收到报错后，会**被迫重新 `Read` 这个文件**，从而刷新它脑子里的上下文！这是一种”因祸得福”。

.claude/worktrees/agent-a70d7592f5ce7020e/packages/docs/technical/one-man-army.md:20:### 🛡️ 第二道防线：编辑工具的“天然免疫力” (Stale Context Rejection)如果 Feature B 等了 3 分钟才拿到 `main.go` 的物理锁，此时 `main.go` 已经被 Feature A 改得面目全非了怎么办？**大模型的 `Edit/Replace` 工具是天然防呆的。** 它在修改前必须匹配具体的代码片段上下文（`oldString`）。如果 Feature A 改了这段代码，Feature B 在拿到锁执行替换时，底层会直接抛出错误：`Error: target string not found`。大模型收到报错后，会**被迫重新 `Read` 这个文件**，从而刷新它脑子里的上下文！这是一种极其优雅的“因祸得福”。

.claude/worktrees/agent-aae96126f068ecf8f/docs/technical/us/one-man-army.md:29:    27|What if Feature B waits 3 minutes to acquire the physical lock on `main.go`, but `main.go` has already been drastically changed by Feature A? **The large model's `Edit/Replace` tool is naturally foolproof.** It must match specific code snippet context (`oldString`) before making modifications. If Feature A changed this code, when Feature B acquires the lock and attempts the replacement, the underlying system will directly throw an error: `Error: target string not found`. Upon receiving the error, the large model is **forced to re-`Read` this file**, thereby refreshing its mental context! This is a "blessing in disguise."
.claude/worktrees/agent-aae96126f068ecf8f/docs/technical/us/analysis-emotion-and-cog-load.md:36:    34|Every time AI outputs something, you are uncertain: Is this true? Is this complete? Are there errors I have not found? Did it do something I do not know about?
.claude/worktrees/agent-aae96126f068ecf8f/docs/technical/cn/one-man-army.md:22:    20|### 🛡️ 第二道防线：编辑工具的“天然免疫力” (Stale Context Rejection)如果 Feature B 等了 3 分钟才拿到 `main.go` 的物理锁，此时 `main.go` 已经被 Feature A 改得面目全非了怎么办？**大模型的 `Edit/Replace` 工具是天然防呆的。** 它在修改前必须匹配具体的代码片段上下文（`oldString`）。如果 Feature A 改了这段代码，Feature B 在拿到锁执行替换时，底层会直接抛出错误：`Error: target string not found`。大模型收到报错后，会**被迫重新 `Read` 这个文件**，从而刷新它脑子里的上下文！这是一种”因祸得福”。

.claude/worktrees/agent-af2a9f9c8202066f0/docs/technical/us/one-man-army.md:29:    27|What if Feature B waits 3 minutes to acquire the physical lock on `main.go`, but `main.go` has already been drastically changed by Feature A? **The large model's `Edit/Replace` tool is naturally foolproof.** It must match specific code snippet context (`oldString`) before making modifications. If Feature A changed this code, when Feature B acquires the lock and attempts the replacement, the underlying system will directly throw an error: `Error: target string not found`. Upon receiving the error, the large model is **forced to re-`Read` this file**, thereby refreshing its mental context! This is a "blessing in disguise."
.claude/worktrees/agent-af2a9f9c8202066f0/docs/technical/us/analysis-emotion-and-cog-load.md:36:    34|Every time AI outputs something, you are uncertain: Is this true? Is this complete? Are there errors I have not found? Did it do something I do not know about?
.claude/worktrees/agent-af2a9f9c8202066f0/docs/technical/cn/one-man-army.md:22:    20|### 🛡️ 第二道防线：编辑工具的“天然免疫力” (Stale Context Rejection)如果 Feature B 等了 3 分钟才拿到 `main.go` 的物理锁，此时 `main.go` 已经被 Feature A 改得面目全非了怎么办？**大模型的 `Edit/Replace` 工具是天然防呆的。** 它在修改前必须匹配具体的代码片段上下文（`oldString`）。如果 Feature A 改了这段代码，Feature B 在拿到锁执行替换时，底层会直接抛出错误：`Error: target string not found`。大模型收到报错后，会**被迫重新 `Read` 这个文件**，从而刷新它脑子里的上下文！这是一种”因祸得福”。

.claude/worktrees/agent-aa0886b503abeb653/docs/technical/us/one-man-army.md:29:    27|What if Feature B waits 3 minutes to acquire the physical lock on `main.go`, but `main.go` has already been drastically changed by Feature A? **The large model's `Edit/Replace` tool is naturally foolproof.** It must match specific code snippet context (`oldString`) before making modifications. If Feature A changed this code, when Feature B acquires the lock and attempts the replacement, the underlying system will directly throw an error: `Error: target string not found`. Upon receiving the error, the large model is **forced to re-`Read` this file**, thereby refreshing its mental context! This is a "blessing in disguise."
.claude/worktrees/agent-aa0886b503abeb653/docs/dogfooding/cn/dogfood-cross-platform-windows.md:16:- **F2.8**: 4 个 Stop hook 用相对路径 → Stop 事件触发时 CWD 漂移 → `No such file`
.claude/worktrees/agent-aa0886b503abeb653/docs/technical/cn/one-man-army.md:22:    20|### 🛡️ 第二道防线：编辑工具的“天然免疫力” (Stale Context Rejection)如果 Feature B 等了 3 分钟才拿到 `main.go` 的物理锁，此时 `main.go` 已经被 Feature A 改得面目全非了怎么办？**大模型的 `Edit/Replace` 工具是天然防呆的。** 它在修改前必须匹配具体的代码片段上下文（`oldString`）。如果 Feature A 改了这段代码，Feature B 在拿到锁执行替换时，底层会直接抛出错误：`Error: target string not found`。大模型收到报错后，会**被迫重新 `Read` 这个文件**，从而刷新它脑子里的上下文！这是一种”因祸得福”。

.claude/worktrees/agent-a53a414a3e7299ce9/docs/technical/us/one-man-army.md:29:    27|What if Feature B waits 3 minutes to acquire the physical lock on `main.go`, but `main.go` has already been drastically changed by Feature A? **The large model's `Edit/Replace` tool is naturally foolproof.** It must match specific code snippet context (`oldString`) before making modifications. If Feature A changed this code, when Feature B acquires the lock and attempts the replacement, the underlying system will directly throw an error: `Error: target string not found`. Upon receiving the error, the large model is **forced to re-`Read` this file**, thereby refreshing its mental context! This is a "blessing in disguise."
.claude/worktrees/agent-a53a414a3e7299ce9/docs/dogfooding/cn/dogfood-cross-platform-windows.md:16:- **F2.8**: 4 个 Stop hook 用相对路径 → Stop 事件触发时 CWD 漂移 → `No such file`

.claude/worktrees/agent-a53a414a3e7299ce9/docs/technical/cn/one-man-army.md:22:    20|### 🛡️ 第二道防线：编辑工具的“天然免疫力” (Stale Context Rejection)如果 Feature B 等了 3 分钟才拿到 `main.go` 的物理锁，此时 `main.go` 已经被 Feature A 改得面目全非了怎么办？**大模型的 `Edit/Replace` 工具是天然防呆的。** 它在修改前必须匹配具体的代码片段上下文（`oldString`）。如果 Feature A 改了这段代码，Feature B 在拿到锁执行替换时，底层会直接抛出错误：`Error: target string not found`。大模型收到报错后，会**被迫重新 `Read` 这个文件**，从而刷新它脑子里的上下文！这是一种”因祸得福”。

.claude/worktrees/agent-a53a414a3e7299ce9/packages/docs/technical/one-man-army.md:20:### 🛡️ 第二道防线：编辑工具的“天然免疫力” (Stale Context Rejection)如果 Feature B 等了 3 分钟才拿到 `main.go` 的物理锁，此时 `main.go` 已经被 Feature A 改得面目全非了怎么办？**大模型的 `Edit/Replace` 工具是天然防呆的。** 它在修改前必须匹配具体的代码片段上下文（`oldString`）。如果 Feature A 改了这段代码，Feature B 在拿到锁执行替换时，底层会直接抛出错误：`Error: target string not found`。大模型收到报错后，会**被迫重新 `Read` 这个文件**，从而刷新它脑子里的上下文！这是一种极其优雅的“因祸得福”。

.claude/worktrees/agent-aa37f76de562a71e4/docs/technical/us/one-man-army.md:29:    27|What if Feature B waits 3 minutes to acquire the physical lock on `main.go`, but `main.go` has already been drastically changed by Feature A? **The large model's `Edit/Replace` tool is naturally foolproof.** It must match specific code snippet context (`oldString`) before making modifications. If Feature A changed this code, when Feature B acquires the lock and attempts the replacement, the underlying system will directly throw an error: `Error: target string not found`. Upon receiving the error, the large model is **forced to re-`Read` this file**, thereby refreshing its mental context! This is a "blessing in disguise."

.claude/worktrees/agent-aa37f76de562a71e4/docs/technical/cn/one-man-army.md:22:    20|### 🛡️ 第二道防线：编辑工具的“天然免疫力” (Stale Context Rejection)如果 Feature B 等了 3 分钟才拿到 `main.go` 的物理锁，此时 `main.go` 已经被 Feature A 改得面目全非了怎么办？**大模型的 `Edit/Replace` 工具是天然防呆的。** 它在修改前必须匹配具体的代码片段上下文（`oldString`）。如果 Feature A 改了这段代码，Feature B 在拿到锁执行替换时，底层会直接抛出错误：`Error: target string not found`。大模型收到报错后，会**被迫重新 `Read` 这个文件**，从而刷新它脑子里的上下文！这是一种”因祸得福”。

.claude/worktrees/agent-a1b32741d781639ac/docs/technical/us/one-man-army.md:29:    27|What if Feature B waits 3 minutes to acquire the physical lock on `main.go`, but `main.go` has already been drastically changed by Feature A? **The large model's `Edit/Replace` tool is naturally foolproof.** It must match specific code snippet context (`oldString`) before making modifications. If Feature A changed this code, when Feature B acquires the lock and attempts the replacement, the underlying system will directly throw an error: `Error: target string not found`. Upon receiving the error, the large model is **forced to re-`Read` this file**, thereby refreshing its mental context! This is a "blessing in disguise."

.claude/worktrees/agent-a5f0dc884aa1798ac/docs/dogfooding/cn/dogfood-cross-platform-windows.md:16:- **F2.8**: 4 个 Stop hook 用相对路径 → Stop 事件触发时 CWD 漂移 → `No such file`
.claude/worktrees/agent-a5f0dc884aa1798ac/docs/technical/us/one-man-army.md:29:    27|What if Feature B waits 3 minutes to acquire the physical lock on `main.go`, but `main.go` has already been drastically changed by Feature A? **The large model's `Edit/Replace` tool is naturally foolproof.** It must match specific code snippet context (`oldString`) before making modifications. If Feature A changed this code, when Feature B acquires the lock and attempts the replacement, the underlying system will directly throw an error: `Error: target string not found`. Upon receiving the error, the large model is **forced to re-`Read` this file**, thereby refreshing its mental context! This is a "blessing in disguise."
.claude/worktrees/agent-a5f0dc884aa1798ac/docs/technical/cn/one-man-army.md:22:    20|### 🛡️ 第二道防线：编辑工具的“天然免疫力” (Stale Context Rejection)如果 Feature B 等了 3 分钟才拿到 `main.go` 的物理锁，此时 `main.go` 已经被 Feature A 改得面目全非了怎么办？**大模型的 `Edit/Replace` 工具是天然防呆的。** 它在修改前必须匹配具体的代码片段上下文（`oldString`）。如果 Feature A 改了这段代码，Feature B 在拿到锁执行替换时，底层会直接抛出错误：`Error: target string not found`。大模型收到报错后，会**被迫重新 `Read` 这个文件**，从而刷新它脑子里的上下文！这是一种”因祸得福”。

.claude/worktrees/agent-a5f0dc884aa1798ac/packages/docs/technical/one-man-army.md:20:### 🛡️ 第二道防线：编辑工具的“天然免疫力” (Stale Context Rejection)如果 Feature B 等了 3 分钟才拿到 `main.go` 的物理锁，此时 `main.go` 已经被 Feature A 改得面目全非了怎么办？**大模型的 `Edit/Replace` 工具是天然防呆的。** 它在修改前必须匹配具体的代码片段上下文（`oldString`）。如果 Feature A 改了这段代码，Feature B 在拿到锁执行替换时，底层会直接抛出错误：`Error: target string not found`。大模型收到报错后，会**被迫重新 `Read` 这个文件**，从而刷新它脑子里的上下文！这是一种极其优雅的“因祸得福”。

.claude/worktrees/agent-ab4626bc638c7c0e0/docs/technical/us/one-man-army.md:29:    27|What if Feature B waits 3 minutes to acquire the physical lock on `main.go`, but `main.go` has already been drastically changed by Feature A? **The large model's `Edit/Replace` tool is naturally foolproof.** It must match specific code snippet context (`oldString`) before making modifications. If Feature A changed this code, when Feature B acquires the lock and attempts the replacement, the underlying system will directly throw an error: `Error: target string not found`. Upon receiving the error, the large model is **forced to re-`Read` this file**, thereby refreshing its mental context! This is a "blessing in disguise."

.claude/worktrees/agent-ab4626bc638c7c0e0/docs/technical/cn/one-man-army.md:22:    20|### 🛡️ 第二道防线：编辑工具的“天然免疫力” (Stale Context Rejection)如果 Feature B 等了 3 分钟才拿到 `main.go` 的物理锁，此时 `main.go` 已经被 Feature A 改得面目全非了怎么办？**大模型的 `Edit/Replace` 工具是天然防呆的。** 它在修改前必须匹配具体的代码片段上下文（`oldString`）。如果 Feature A 改了这段代码，Feature B 在拿到锁执行替换时，底层会直接抛出错误：`Error: target string not found`。大模型收到报错后，会**被迫重新 `Read` 这个文件**，从而刷新它脑子里的上下文！这是一种”因祸得福”。

.claude/worktrees/agent-aeb8d7dff43c22a66/docs/technical/us/one-man-army.md:29:    27|What if Feature B waits 3 minutes to acquire the physical lock on `main.go`, but `main.go` has already been drastically changed by Feature A? **The large model's `Edit/Replace` tool is naturally foolproof.** It must match specific code snippet context (`oldString`) before making modifications. If Feature A changed this code, when Feature B acquires the lock and attempts the replacement, the underlying system will directly throw an error: `Error: target string not found`. Upon receiving the error, the large model is **forced to re-`Read` this file**, thereby refreshing its mental context! This is a "blessing in disguise."
.claude/worktrees/agent-aeb8d7dff43c22a66/docs/technical/cn/one-man-army.md:22:    20|### 🛡️ 第二道防线：编辑工具的“天然免疫力” (Stale Context Rejection)如果 Feature B 等了 3 分钟才拿到 `main.go` 的物理锁，此时 `main.go` 已经被 Feature A 改得面目全非了怎么办？**大模型的 `Edit/Replace` 工具是天然防呆的。** 它在修改前必须匹配具体的代码片段上下文（`oldString`）。如果 Feature A 改了这段代码，Feature B 在拿到锁执行替换时，底层会直接抛出错误：`Error: target string not found`。大模型收到报错后，会**被迫重新 `Read` 这个文件**，从而刷新它脑子里的上下文！这是一种”因祸得福”。

.claude/worktrees/agent-a01e5bc9caaf63b6e/docs/dogfooding/cn/dogfood-cross-platform-windows.md:16:- **F2.8**: 4 个 Stop hook 用相对路径 → Stop 事件触发时 CWD 漂移 → `No such file`
.claude/worktrees/agent-a01e5bc9caaf63b6e/docs/technical/us/one-man-army.md:29:    27|What if Feature B waits 3 minutes to acquire the physical lock on `main.go`, but `main.go` has already been drastically changed by Feature A? **The large model's `Edit/Replace` tool is naturally foolproof.** It must match specific code snippet context (`oldString`) before making modifications. If Feature A changed this code, when Feature B acquires the lock and attempts the replacement, the underlying system will directly throw an error: `Error: target string not found`. Upon receiving the error, the large model is **forced to re-`Read` this file**, thereby refreshing its mental context! This is a "blessing in disguise."

.claude/worktrees/agent-a55c2d7dc6b4ecf7e/docs/technical/us/one-man-army.md:29:    27|What if Feature B waits 3 minutes to acquire the physical lock on `main.go`, but `main.go` has already been drastically changed by Feature A? **The large model's `Edit/Replace` tool is naturally foolproof.** It must match specific code snippet context (`oldString`) before making modifications. If Feature A changed this code, when Feature B acquires the lock and attempts the replacement, the underlying system will directly throw an error: `Error: target string not found`. Upon receiving the error, the large model is **forced to re-`Read` this file**, thereby refreshing its mental context! This is a "blessing in disguise."

.claude/worktrees/agent-a55c2d7dc6b4ecf7e/docs/technical/cn/one-man-army.md:22:    20|### 🛡️ 第二道防线：编辑工具的“天然免疫力” (Stale Context Rejection)如果 Feature B 等了 3 分钟才拿到 `main.go` 的物理锁，此时 `main.go` 已经被 Feature A 改得面目全非了怎么办？**大模型的 `Edit/Replace` 工具是天然防呆的。** 它在修改前必须匹配具体的代码片段上下文（`oldString`）。如果 Feature A 改了这段代码，Feature B 在拿到锁执行替换时，底层会直接抛出错误：`Error: target string not found`。大模型收到报错后，会**被迫重新 `Read` 这个文件**，从而刷新它脑子里的上下文！这是一种”因祸得福”。

.claude/worktrees/agent-a31ad91e132305089/docs/technical/us/one-man-army.md:29:    27|What if Feature B waits 3 minutes to acquire the physical lock on `main.go`, but `main.go` has already been drastically changed by Feature A? **The large model's `Edit/Replace` tool is naturally foolproof.** It must match specific code snippet context (`oldString`) before making modifications. If Feature A changed this code, when Feature B acquires the lock and attempts the replacement, the underlying system will directly throw an error: `Error: target string not found`. Upon receiving the error, the large model is **forced to re-`Read` this file**, thereby refreshing its mental context! This is a "blessing in disguise."
.claude/worktrees/agent-a31ad91e132305089/docs/technical/cn/one-man-army.md:22:    20|### 🛡️ 第二道防线：编辑工具的“天然免疫力” (Stale Context Rejection)如果 Feature B 等了 3 分钟才拿到 `main.go` 的物理锁，此时 `main.go` 已经被 Feature A 改得面目全非了怎么办？**大模型的 `Edit/Replace` 工具是天然防呆的。** 它在修改前必须匹配具体的代码片段上下文（`oldString`）。如果 Feature A 改了这段代码，Feature B 在拿到锁执行替换时，底层会直接抛出错误：`Error: target string not found`。大模型收到报错后，会**被迫重新 `Read` 这个文件**，从而刷新它脑子里的上下文！这是一种”因祸得福”。

.claude/worktrees/agent-a31ad91e132305089/packages/docs/technical/one-man-army.md:20:### 🛡️ 第二道防线：编辑工具的“天然免疫力” (Stale Context Rejection)如果 Feature B 等了 3 分钟才拿到 `main.go` 的物理锁，此时 `main.go` 已经被 Feature A 改得面目全非了怎么办？**大模型的 `Edit/Replace` 工具是天然防呆的。** 它在修改前必须匹配具体的代码片段上下文（`oldString`）。如果 Feature A 改了这段代码，Feature B 在拿到锁执行替换时，底层会直接抛出错误：`Error: target string not found`。大模型收到报错后，会**被迫重新 `Read` 这个文件**，从而刷新它脑子里的上下文！这是一种极其优雅的“因祸得福”。

.claude/worktrees/agent-a8c57e37f5b962fb8/docs/technical/us/one-man-army.md:29:    27|What if Feature B waits 3 minutes to acquire the physical lock on `main.go`, but `main.go` has already been drastically changed by Feature A? **The large model's `Edit/Replace` tool is naturally foolproof.** It must match specific code snippet context (`oldString`) before making modifications. If Feature A changed this code, when Feature B acquires the lock and attempts the replacement, the underlying system will directly throw an error: `Error: target string not found`. Upon receiving the error, the large model is **forced to re-`Read` this file**, thereby refreshing its mental context! This is a "blessing in disguise."

.claude/worktrees/agent-a8c57e37f5b962fb8/docs/technical/cn/one-man-army.md:22:    20|### 🛡️ 第二道防线：编辑工具的“天然免疫力” (Stale Context Rejection)如果 Feature B 等了 3 分钟才拿到 `main.go` 的物理锁，此时 `main.go` 已经被 Feature A 改得面目全非了怎么办？**大模型的 `Edit/Replace` 工具是天然防呆的。** 它在修改前必须匹配具体的代码片段上下文（`oldString`）。如果 Feature A 改了这段代码，Feature B 在拿到锁执行替换时，底层会直接抛出错误：`Error: target string not found`。大模型收到报错后，会**被迫重新 `Read` 这个文件**，从而刷新它脑子里的上下文！这是一种”因祸得福”。

.claude/worktrees/agent-a06d1047bd689a76c/docs/technical/us/one-man-army.md:29:    27|What if Feature B waits 3 minutes to acquire the physical lock on `main.go`, but `main.go` has already been drastically changed by Feature A? **The large model's `Edit/Replace` tool is naturally foolproof.** It must match specific code snippet context (`oldString`) before making modifications. If Feature A changed this code, when Feature B acquires the lock and attempts the replacement, the underlying system will directly throw an error: `Error: target string not found`. Upon receiving the error, the large model is **forced to re-`Read` this file**, thereby refreshing its mental context! This is a "blessing in disguise."

.claude/worktrees/agent-a06d1047bd689a76c/docs/technical/cn/one-man-army.md:22:    20|### 🛡️ 第二道防线：编辑工具的“天然免疫力” (Stale Context Rejection)如果 Feature B 等了 3 分钟才拿到 `main.go` 的物理锁，此时 `main.go` 已经被 Feature A 改得面目全非了怎么办？**大模型的 `Edit/Replace` 工具是天然防呆的。** 它在修改前必须匹配具体的代码片段上下文（`oldString`）。如果 Feature A 改了这段代码，Feature B 在拿到锁执行替换时，底层会直接抛出错误：`Error: target string not found`。大模型收到报错后，会**被迫重新 `Read` 这个文件**，从而刷新它脑子里的上下文！这是一种”因祸得福”。

.claude/worktrees/agent-a0e5c18765d95167a/docs/technical/cn/one-man-army.md:22:    20|### 🛡️ 第二道防线：编辑工具的“天然免疫力” (Stale Context Rejection)如果 Feature B 等了 3 分钟才拿到 `main.go` 的物理锁，此时 `main.go` 已经被 Feature A 改得面目全非了怎么办？**大模型的 `Edit/Replace` 工具是天然防呆的。** 它在修改前必须匹配具体的代码片段上下文（`oldString`）。如果 Feature A 改了这段代码，Feature B 在拿到锁执行替换时，底层会直接抛出错误：`Error: target string not found`。大模型收到报错后，会**被迫重新 `Read` 这个文件**，从而刷新它脑子里的上下文！这是一种”因祸得福”。

.claude/worktrees/agent-a0e5c18765d95167a/docs/technical/us/one-man-army.md:29:    27|What if Feature B waits 3 minutes to acquire the physical lock on `main.go`, but `main.go` has already been drastically changed by Feature A? **The large model's `Edit/Replace` tool is naturally foolproof.** It must match specific code snippet context (`oldString`) before making modifications. If Feature A changed this code, when Feature B acquires the lock and attempts the replacement, the underlying system will directly throw an error: `Error: target string not found`. Upon receiving the error, the large model is **forced to re-`Read` this file**, thereby refreshing its mental context! This is a "blessing in disguise."

.claude/worktrees/agent-a0e5c18765d95167a/packages/docs/technical/one-man-army.md:20:### 🛡️ 第二道防线：编辑工具的“天然免疫力” (Stale Context Rejection)如果 Feature B 等了 3 分钟才拿到 `main.go` 的物理锁，此时 `main.go` 已经被 Feature A 改得面目全非了怎么办？**大模型的 `Edit/Replace` 工具是天然防呆的。** 它在修改前必须匹配具体的代码片段上下文（`oldString`）。如果 Feature A 改了这段代码，Feature B 在拿到锁执行替换时，底层会直接抛出错误：`Error: target string not found`。大模型收到报错后，会**被迫重新 `Read` 这个文件**，从而刷新它脑子里的上下文！这是一种极其优雅的“因祸得福”。

.claude/worktrees/agent-a35f12cbd0b735127/docs/technical/cn/one-man-army.md:22:    20|### 🛡️ 第二道防线：编辑工具的“天然免疫力” (Stale Context Rejection)如果 Feature B 等了 3 分钟才拿到 `main.go` 的物理锁，此时 `main.go` 已经被 Feature A 改得面目全非了怎么办？**大模型的 `Edit/Replace` 工具是天然防呆的。** 它在修改前必须匹配具体的代码片段上下文（`oldString`）。如果 Feature A 改了这段代码，Feature B 在拿到锁执行替换时，底层会直接抛出错误：`Error: target string not found`。大模型收到报错后，会**被迫重新 `Read` 这个文件**，从而刷新它脑子里的上下文！这是一种”因祸得福”。

.claude/worktrees/agent-a35f12cbd0b735127/docs/technical/us/one-man-army.md:29:    27|What if Feature B waits 3 minutes to acquire the physical lock on `main.go`, but `main.go` has already been drastically changed by Feature A? **The large model's `Edit/Replace` tool is naturally foolproof.** It must match specific code snippet context (`oldString`) before making modifications. If Feature A changed this code, when Feature B acquires the lock and attempts the replacement, the underlying system will directly throw an error: `Error: target string not found`. Upon receiving the error, the large model is **forced to re-`Read` this file**, thereby refreshing its mental context! This is a "blessing in disguise."

.claude/worktrees/agent-a1ea4339989ca6aac/docs/technical/us/one-man-army.md:29:    27|What if Feature B waits 3 minutes to acquire the physical lock on `main.go`, but `main.go` has already been drastically changed by Feature A? **The large model's `Edit/Replace` tool is naturally foolproof.** It must match specific code snippet context (`oldString`) before making modifications. If Feature A changed this code, when Feature B acquires the lock and attempts the replacement, the underlying system will directly throw an error: `Error: target string not found`. Upon receiving the error, the large model is **forced to re-`Read` this file**, thereby refreshing its mental context! This is a "blessing in disguise."

.claude/worktrees/agent-a1ea4339989ca6aac/docs/technical/cn/one-man-army.md:22:    20|### 🛡️ 第二道防线：编辑工具的“天然免疫力” (Stale Context Rejection)如果 Feature B 等了 3 分钟才拿到 `main.go` 的物理锁，此时 `main.go` 已经被 Feature A 改得面目全非了怎么办？**大模型的 `Edit/Replace` 工具是天然防呆的。** 它在修改前必须匹配具体的代码片段上下文（`oldString`）。如果 Feature A 改了这段代码，Feature B 在拿到锁执行替换时，底层会直接抛出错误：`Error: target string not found`。大模型收到报错后，会**被迫重新 `Read` 这个文件**，从而刷新它脑子里的上下文！这是一种”因祸得福”。

.claude/worktrees/agent-adc1e860a225e931e/docs/technical/us/one-man-army.md:29:    27|What if Feature B waits 3 minutes to acquire the physical lock on `main.go`, but `main.go` has already been drastically changed by Feature A? **The large model's `Edit/Replace` tool is naturally foolproof.** It must match specific code snippet context (`oldString`) before making modifications. If Feature A changed this code, when Feature B acquires the lock and attempts the replacement, the underlying system will directly throw an error: `Error: target string not found`. Upon receiving the error, the large model is **forced to re-`Read` this file**, thereby refreshing its mental context! This is a "blessing in disguise."

.claude/worktrees/agent-a4998999cefe6acaa/docs/technical/us/one-man-army.md:29:    27|What if Feature B waits 3 minutes to acquire the physical lock on `main.go`, but `main.go` has already been drastically changed by Feature A? **The large model's `Edit/Replace` tool is naturally foolproof.** It must match specific code snippet context (`oldString`) before making modifications. If Feature A changed this code, when Feature B acquires the lock and attempts the replacement, the underlying system will directly throw an error: `Error: target string not found`. Upon receiving the error, the large model is **forced to re-`Read` this file**, thereby refreshing its mental context! This is a "blessing in disguise."
.claude/worktrees/agent-a4998999cefe6acaa/docs/technical/us/analysis-emotion-and-cog-load.md:36:    34|Every time AI outputs something, you are uncertain: Is this true? Is this complete? Are there errors I have not found? Did it do something I do not know about?
.claude/worktrees/agent-a4998999cefe6acaa/docs/technical/cn/one-man-army.md:22:    20|### 🛡️ 第二道防线：编辑工具的“天然免疫力” (Stale Context Rejection)如果 Feature B 等了 3 分钟才拿到 `main.go` 的物理锁，此时 `main.go` 已经被 Feature A 改得面目全非了怎么办？**大模型的 `Edit/Replace` 工具是天然防呆的。** 它在修改前必须匹配具体的代码片段上下文（`oldString`）。如果 Feature A 改了这段代码，Feature B 在拿到锁执行替换时，底层会直接抛出错误：`Error: target string not found`。大模型收到报错后，会**被迫重新 `Read` 这个文件**，从而刷新它脑子里的上下文！这是一种”因祸得福”。

.claude/worktrees/agent-a4998999cefe6acaa/packages/docs/technical/one-man-army.md:20:### 🛡️ 第二道防线：编辑工具的“天然免疫力” (Stale Context Rejection)如果 Feature B 等了 3 分钟才拿到 `main.go` 的物理锁，此时 `main.go` 已经被 Feature A 改得面目全非了怎么办？**大模型的 `Edit/Replace` 工具是天然防呆的。** 它在修改前必须匹配具体的代码片段上下文（`oldString`）。如果 Feature A 改了这段代码，Feature B 在拿到锁执行替换时，底层会直接抛出错误：`Error: target string not found`。大模型收到报错后，会**被迫重新 `Read` 这个文件**，从而刷新它脑子里的上下文！这是一种极其优雅的“因祸得福”。

steps=None):\n    now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)\n    suffix = now.strftime(\"%Y%m%d\")\n    tid = task_id or f\"sess_{suffix}_0000\"\n    if steps is None:\n        steps = [\"S1\"]\n    return {\n          \"updated_at\": now.isoformat(),\n        },\n        \"task_dir\": str(TASK_DIR) if TASK_DIR else \"\",\n        \"status\": \"active\",\n        \"task\": {\n            \"current_step\": steps[0] if steps else \"S1\",\n            \"status\": \"active\",\n            \"blocked\": None,\n        },\n        \"stats\": {\n            \"done\": 0,\n            \"total\": len(steps),\n            \"tick\": 0,\n        },\n    }\n\n\ndef _load_token(path=None):\n    p = Path(path) if path else TOKEN_PATH\n    if p and p.exists():\n        try:\n            return json.loads(p.read_text())\n        except (json.JSONDecodeError, OSError):\n            return None\n    return None\n\n\nclass CASConflict(RuntimeError):\n    \"\"\"Raised when strict token CAS detects a stale expected revision.\"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self, expected_revision, current_revision):\n        self.expected_revision = expected_revision\n        self.current_revision = current_revision\n        super().__init__(\n            f\"CAS_CONFLICT expected_revision={expected_revision} current_revision={current_revision}\"\n        )\n\n\ndef _save_token(token, path=None, expected_revision=None):\n    p = Path(path) if path else TOKEN_PATH\n    if p is None:\n        raise ValueError(\"TOKEN_PATH is not initialized\")\n    p.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n    lock_path = p.with_suffix(p.suffix + \".lock\")\n    tmp_path = p.with_suffix(p.suffix + f\".{os.getpid()}.tmp\")\n\n    with lock_path.open(\"a+\") as lock_file:\n        fcntl.flock(lock_file.fileno(), fcntl.LOCK_EX)\n        try:\n            token.setdefault(\"session\", {})[\"updated_at\"] = datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()\n\n            if expected_revision is not None:\n                current = _load_token(p) if p.exists() else None\n                current_revision = current.get(\"revision\", 0) if isinstance(current, dict) else 0\n                if current_revision != expected_revision:\n                    raise CASConflict(expected_revision, current_revision)\n                token[\"revision\"] = current_revision + 1\n            else:\n                token[\"revision\"] = token.get(\"revision\", 0) + 1  # legacy monotonic increment\n\n            data = json.dumps(token, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + \"\\n\"\n            with tmp_path.open(\"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\n                f.write(data)\n                f.flush()\n                os.fsync(f.fileno())\n            os.replace(tmp_path, p)\n        finally:\n            if tmp_path.exists():\n                tmp_path.unlink(missing_ok=True)\n            fcntl.flock(lock_file.fileno(), fcntl.LOCK_UN)\n\n\ndef now_iso():\n    return carros_utils.now_iso() if carros_utils else datetime.now(timezone.utc).replace(microsecond=0).isoformat()\n\n\ndef _write_handoff(token, plan_summary=None):\n    \"\"\"写入 Resume Capsule（NOT_SOURCE_OF_TRUTH）— 委托 handoff_writer\"\"\"\n    try:\n        import lib.handoff_writer as hw\n        tid = token.get(\"session\", {}).get(\"id\", \"unknown\")\n        hw.write_handoff(TASK_DIR, tid, token, PLAN_PATH)\n    except (ImportError, Exception) as e:\n        pass  # fallback → 旧版 inline\n    HANDOFF_PATH.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n    now = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime(\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M UTC\")\n    done = token.get(\"stats\", {}).get(\"done\", 0)\n    total = token.get(\"stats\", {}).get(\"total\", 0)\n    current = token.get(\"task\", {}).get(\"current_step\", \"?\")\n    steps_summary = f\"  current_step: {current} ({done}/{total})\"\n    plan = \"\"\n    if PLAN_PATH.exists():\n        plan = PLAN_PATH.read_text()[:300]\n    content = (\n        f\"# Session Handoff: {token.get('session', {}).get('id', 'unknown')}\\n\"\n        f\"\\n\"\n        f\"**Updated:** {now}\\n\"\n        f\"**Level:** {token.get('session', {}).get('level', '?')}\\n\"\n        f\"**Progress:** {done}/{total} steps\\n\"\n        f\"\\n\"\n        f\"## Steps\\n\"\n        f\"{steps_summary}\\n\"\n        f\"\\n\"\n        f\"## Plan (condensed)\\n\"\n        f\"{plan}\\n\"\n        f\"\\n\"\n        f\"---\\n\"\n        f\"_Auto-generated by carros_base.py_\\n\"\n    )\n    HANDOFF_PATH.write_text(content)\n\n\n# ═══════════════════════════════════════════\n# Plan / Executor helpers\n# ═══════════════════════════════════════════\n\ndef _write_default_plan(steps=None):\n    \"\"\"创建默认 plan.md 模板\"\"\"\n    if steps is None:\n        steps = [\"S1\"]\n    PLAN_PATH.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n    lines = [\"# Plan\\n\", \"\", \"## Goal\\n\\n\", \"## Scope\\n\\n\"]\n    lines.append(\"## Steps\\n\")\n    for s in steps:\n        lines.append(f\"- [ ] {s}: \\n\")\n    lines.append(\"\\n## Verify\\n\")\n    for s in steps:\n        lines.append(f\"- {s}: \\n\")\n    lines.append(\"\\n---\\n\")\n    lines.append(\"> 冻结规则：不改 scope、不改 step 顺序、不改 verify 条件。\\n\")\n    PLAN_PATH.write_text(\"\".join(lines))\n\n\ndef _write_default_executor():\n    \"\"\"创建空 executor.md 证据账簿\"\"\"\n    EXECUTOR_PATH.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n    content = \"\"\"# Executor Evidence Ledger\n\n> schema_version: v1.0\n> 每步必须包含标准 evidence block。\n\n## S1\n\n**证据块：**\n```\n- action:\n- file:\n- command:\n- output:\n- status: [PASS/FAIL]\n```\n\n---\n\"\"\"\n    EXECUTOR_PATH.write_text(content)\n\n\ndef _write_default_research():\n    \"\"\"创建 research.md — 子任务也可引用 src.md\"\"\"\n    RESEARCH_PATH.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n    content = \"\"\"# Research\n\n> 事实层：技术决策、架构边界、参考来源\n\n## 背景\n\n## 约束\n\n## 已知信息\n\"\"\"\n    RESEARCH_PATH.write_text(content)\n\n\ndef _init_task_dirs():\n    \"\"\"初始化任务子目录：sub_task/ + state/ + state/audit + artifacts/\"\"\"\n    for d in [SUB_TASK_DIR, STATE_DIR, AUDIT_DIR]:\n        d.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n    # artifacts/ for tool store\n    artifacts_dir = TASK_DIR / \"artifacts\" if TASK_DIR else None\n    if artifacts_dir:\n        artifacts_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n    # evidence.jsonl for L2+\n    if TASK_DIR:\n        evidence_path = TASK_DIR / \"evidence.jsonl\"\n        if not evidence_path.exists():\n            evidence_path.touch()\n    # working-set.yaml for L2+\n    if TASK_DIR:\n        ws_path = TASK_DIR / \"working-set.yaml\"\n        if not ws_path.exists():\n            ws_template = PROJECT_ROOT / \".claude/references/working-set-template.yaml\"\n            if ws_template.exists():\n                ws_path.write_text(ws_template.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n\n\ndef _inject_plan_step(step_id):\n    \"\"\"为 plan.md 补充 step，当 step 不在已有列表时追加\"\"\"\n    if not PLAN_PATH.exists():\n        _write_default_plan([step_id])\n        return\n    plan = PLAN_PATH.read_text()\n    pattern = r\"- \\[ \\] \" + re.escape(step_id) + r\":\"\n    if re.search(pattern, plan):\n        return  # already exists\n    # append before the last line (freeze note)\n    lines = plan.rstrip().split(\"\\n\")\n    insert_idx = len(lines)\n    for i, line in enumerate(lines):\n        if line.startswith(\"## Verify\"):\n            insert_idx = i\n            break\n    lines.insert(insert_idx, f\"- [ ] {step_id}: \")\n    lines.insert(insert_idx + 1, \"\")\n    PLAN_PATH.write_text(\"\\n\".join(lines))\n\n\n# ═══════════════════════════════════════════\n# Audit helpers\n# ═══════════════════════════════════════════\n\ndef _write_audit(event_type, data, fallback=False):\n    \"\"\"追加审计事件到当天 JSONL — 委托 carros_utils（自动绑定 task_id）\"\"\"\n    if isinstance(data, dict) and \"task_id\" not in data:\n        _tid = None\n        try:\n            _token = _load_token()\n            if _token:\n                _tid = (_token.get(\"session\") or {}).get(\"id\")\n        except Exception:\n            _tid = None\n        data = dict(data)\n        data[\"task_id\"] = _tid or \"unknown\"\n    if carros_utils:\n        # 如果 AUDIT_DIR 是 None 但 fallback=True，直接写本地\n        ad = AUDIT_DIR\n        if ad is None and fallback:\n            ad = OMC_ROOT / \"state\" / \"audit\"\n        if ad is not None:\n            carros_utils.write_audit(ad, event_type, data, _SCHEMA_VERSION)\n            return\n    # fallback — inline\n    if AUDIT_DIR is None and fallback:\n        ad = OMC_ROOT / \"state\" / \"audit\"\n    else:\n        ad = AUDIT_DIR\n    if ad is None:\n        return  # 无法写 audit\n    ad.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n    date_str = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime(\"%Y%m%d\")\n    audit_file = ad / f\"{date_str}.jsonl\"\n    record = {\n        \"schema_version\": _SCHEMA_VERSION,\n        \"ts\": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),\n        \"event\": event_type,\n        \"data\": data,\n    }\n    with open(audit_file, \"a\") as f:\n        f.write(json.dumps(record, ensure_ascii=False) + \"\\n\")\n\n\n# ═══════════════════════════════════════════\n# Commands\n# ═══════════════════════════════════════════\n\ndef _run_plan_builder(intake_decision, user_request, task_id, feature=None):\n    \"\"\"调用 PlanBuilder 生成 plan.md + 更新 token.json + 写 audit\"\"\"\n    import subprocess as sb\n    import tempfile\n\n    # 暂存 IntakeDecision JSON\n    intake_json = json.dumps(intake_decision, ensure_ascii=False)\n    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode=\"w\", suffix=\".json\", delete=False) as f:\n        f.write(intake_json)\n        intake_path = f.name\n\n    try:\n        plan_builder = _hook_dir / \"plan_builder.py\"\n        if not plan_builder.exists():\n            return None, \"plan_builder.py not found\"\n\n        # 将 token_path 作为环境变量传给 plan_builder\n        env = os.environ.copy()\n        env[\"CARROROS_TOKEN_PATH\"] = str(TOKEN_PATH) if TOKEN_PATH else \"\"\n\n        cmd = [sys.executable, str(plan_builder), intake_path, user_request, task_id]\n        if feature:\n            cmd.append(feature)\n\n        result = sb.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=15, env=env)\n        if result.returncode != 0:\n            return None, result.stderr or \"plan_builder failed\"\n\n        # PlanBuilder 已写入 plan.md + token.json + audit\n        return result.stdout, None\n    finally:\n        os.unlink(intake_path)\n\n\ndef cmd_auto_init(steps=None, target=None):\n    \"\"\"自动初始化模式 — 不要求 task_id，根据当前上下文自动推导。\n\n    用于 PretoolUse hook 自动 init 场景：检测到无 token 写操作时，\n    自动生成 token + task 文档，不阻断 agent 工作流。\n\n    task_id 格式：auto_{ts}_{target_file_hash_short}\n    scope 自动推导：从写操作的目标文件路径\n    \"\"\"\n    import hashlib\n    now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)\n    ts = now.strftime(\"%H%M%S\")\n    if target:\n        h = hashlib.md5(target.encode()).hexdigest()[:6]\n        tid = f\"auto_{h}_{ts}\"\n    else:\n        tid = f\"auto_{ts}\"\n    if steps is None:\n        steps = [\"S1\"]\n    _init_task_paths(task_id=tid)\n    token = _default_token(task_id=tid, level=\"L1\", steps=steps)\n    # 如果提供了 target，写入 scope\n    if target:\n        token[\"scope\"] = [target]\n    _save_token(token)\n    _write_default_plan(steps=steps)\n    _write_default_executor()\n    _write_default_research()\n    _init_task_dirs()\n    _write_handoff(_load_token() or token)\n    print(f\"Auto-init complete: {tid}\")\n    _write_audit(\"auto_init\", {\n        \"task_id\": tid,\n        \"target\": target,\n        \"reason\": \"no_active_token\",\n    }, fallback=True)\n    return 0\n\n\ndef cmd_init(task_id, level=\"L1\", steps=None, user_request=None, task_dir=None, feature=None):\n    \"\"\"初始化任务 — IntakeGate 分级 → PlanBuilder 生成冻结计划\"\"\"\n    _init_task_paths(task_id=task_id, task_dir=task_dir)\n\n    intake_decision_data = None\n\n    # IntakeGate 前置分级（如有 user_request）\n    if user_request:\n        try:\n            import subprocess\n            intake_script = _hook_dir / \"intake_gate.py\"\n            if intake_script.exists():\n                cmd = [sys.executable, str(intake_script), user_request]\n                if level in (\"L2_ENHANCE\", \"L2\"):\n                    cmd.append(\"--enhance-available\")\n                result = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=10)\n                if result.returncode in (0, 1):\n                    try:\n                        intake = json.loads(result.stdout)\n                        decision = intake[\"decision\"]\n                        print(f\"   IntakeGate: {decision} (risk={intake['risk_level']})\")\n                        for r in intake.get(\"reasons\", []):\n                            print(f\"     reason: {r}\")\n\n                        if decision == \"BLOCKED\":\n                            print(_red(f\"❌ BLOCKED: {intake['next_action']}\"))\n                            return 2\n                        elif decision == \"ASK_USER\":\n                            print(_yellow(f\"⚠  ASK_USER: {intake['next_action']}\"))\n                            for c in intake.get(\"required_confirmations\", []):\n                                print(f\"     ⚠ 确认: {c}\")\n                            print(_yellow(\"等待用户补充信息后重新执行 init\"))\n                            # 仍然生成 plan draft 供参考\n                            intake_decision_data = intake\n                        else:\n                            # L1 / L2 — 正常走 PlanBuilder\n                            intake_decision_data = intake\n                    except (json.JSONDecodeError, KeyError) as e:\n                        print(_yellow(f\"   ⚠ IntakeGate parse warning: {e}\"))\n        except subprocess.TimeoutExpired:\n            print(_yellow(\"   ⚠ IntakeGate timed out (10s), continuing with default level\"))\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n    # 将其他 active token 标记为 archived（避免多 token 冲突）\n    archived_count = 0\n    for f in sorted(OMC_TOKENS.rglob(\"*.json\")):\n        try:\n            t = json.loads(f.read_text())\n            if t.get(\"status\") == \"active\":\n                t[\"status\"] = \"archived\"\n                f.write_text(json.dumps(t, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + \"\\n\")\n                archived_count += 1\n        except (json.JSONDecodeError, OSError):\n            continue\n    if archived_count > 0:\n        print(f\"   Archived previous tokens: {archived_count} total\")\n\n    # ── PlanBuilder 生成冻结计划 ──\n    if intake_decision_data:\n        plan_md_output, pb_err = _run_plan_builder(intake_decision_data, user_request, task_id, feature)\n        if pb_err:\n            print(_yellow(f\"   ⚠ PlanBuilder warning: {pb_err}\"))\n            # fallback — 使用旧方式\n            token = _default_token(task_id=task_id, level=level, steps=steps)\n            _save_token(token)\n            _write_default_plan(steps=steps)\n            _write_default_executor()\n            _write_default_research()\n        else:\n            print(_green(f\"   PlanBuilder: plan.md + token generated\"))\n            # plan_builder.py 已写入 plan.md + .omc/state/token.json + audit\n            # 但还需要创建 task dirs 和 executor.md/research.md/handoff\n            _write_default_executor()\n            _write_default_research()\n    else:\n        # 无 user_request 或 intake 失败 — 使用旧方式\n        token = _default_token(task_id=task_id, level=level, steps=steps)\n        _save_token(token)\n        _write_default_plan(steps=steps)\n        _write_default_executor()\n        _write_default_research()\n\n    _init_task_dirs()\n    _write_handoff(_load_token() or _default_token(task_id=task_id, level=level, steps=steps))\n    print(_green(f\"✅ Initialized: {task_id}\"))\n    # 从 token 读取最终信息\n    loaded = _load_token()\n    if loaded:\n        total = loaded.get(\"stats\", {}).get(\"total\", 0)\n        task_blocked = loaded.get(\"task\", {}).get(\"blocked\")\n        if task_blocked:\n            print(f\"   Status: {loaded.get('task', {}).get('status', 'unknown')}\")\n        print(f\"   Steps: {total} total\")\n    print(f\"   Token: {TOKEN_PATH}\")\n    print(f\"   Task:  {TASK_DIR}\")\n    print(f\"   Plan:  {PLAN_PATH}\")\n    print(f\"   Exec:  {EXECUTOR_PATH}\")\n    return 0\n\n\ndef _find_latest_token(require_active=True):\n    \"\"\"扫描 tokens 目录，找到日期最新且活跃的 token\n\n    require_active=True: 只返回 status=active 的 token（首选）\n    require_active=False: 返回任何一个有效的 token（作为回退）\n\n    排序规则：按文件 mtime 倒序（最新写的优先），而非文件名排序\n    \"\"\"\n    OMC_TOKENS.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n    if not OMC_TOKENS.exists():\n        return None, None\n\n    # 收集所有 token 文件，按 mtime 排序\n    candidates = []\n    for dd in sorted(OMC_TOKENS.iterdir(), reverse=True):\n        if dd.is_dir():\n            for jf in dd.glob(\"*.json\"):\n                try:\n                    candidates.append((jf.stat().st_mtime, jf))\n                except OSError:\n                    continue\n\n    # 按 mtime 倒序\n    candidates.sort(key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)\n\n    fallback = None\n    for _, jf in candidates:\n        try:\n            token = json.loads(jf.read_text())\n            if token.get(\"status\") == \"active\":\n                return token, jf\n            if fallback is None:\n                fallback = (token, jf)\n        except (json.JSONDecodeError, OSError):\n            continue\n\n    if fallback and not require_active:\n        return fallback\n    return None, None\n\n\ndef cmd_status(hot_mode=True):\n    \"\"\"展示当前任务状态。默认 Hot Card 模式。--full 出完整状态。\"\"\"\n    if not TOKEN_PATH or not TOKEN_PATH.exists():\n        token, found_path = _find_latest_token()\n        if token and found_path:\n            _init_paths_from_token(token, found_path)\n        else:\n            print(_yellow(\"⚠  No active task\"))\n            return 0\n    token = _load_token()\n    if not token:\n        print(_yellow(\"⚠  No active task (token.json not found)\"))\n        return 0\n\n    if hot_mode:\n        # Hot Card — 极简状态（默认）\n        try:\n            import lib.hot_card as hc\n            card = hc.cmd_status_hot(token, TOKEN_PATH, PLAN_PATH, EXECUTOR_PATH)\n            print(card)\n            hc_len = len(card)\n            if hc_len > 4500:\n                print(_yellow(f\"\\n⚠  Hot Card exceeds 4.5K chars: {hc_len}\"))\n            return 0\n        except ImportError:\n            # fallback: lib/ not available\n            pass\n\n    # Full status（--full 模式或 fallback）\n    s = token.get(\"stats\", {})\n    status_top = token.get(\"status\", \"?\")\n    status_icon = _green(\"●\") if status_top == \"active\" else _red(\"●\")\n    print(f\"{status_icon} Task: {token.get('session', {}).get('id', '?')} [{token.get('session', {}).get('level', '?')}]\")\n    print(f\"   Status: {status_top}\")\n    print(f\"   Progress: {s.get('done', 0)}/{s.get('total', 0)} steps completed\")\n    current_step = token.get(\"task\", {}).get(\"current_step\")\n    task_status = token.get(\"task\", {}).get(\"status\")\n    blocked = token.get(\"task\", {}).get(\"blocked\")\n    current = current_step or \"?\"\n    print(f\"   Current Step: {current}\")\n    print(f\"   Task Status: {task_status}\")\n    if blocked:\n        print(f\"   Blocked: {blocked}\")\n    # task-state 追踪展示\n    if tst:\n        state_info = tst.format_status(token, TOKEN_PATH)\n        if state_info:\n            print(state_info)\n    return 0\n\n\ndef cmd_tick():\n    \"\"\"递增 tick 计数器 + 水位检查 + 自动追踪当前步骤状态\"\"\"\n    if not TOKEN_PATH or not TOKEN_PATH.exists():\n        token, found_path = _find_latest_token()\n        if token and found_path:\n            _init_paths_from_token(token, found_path)\n        else:\n            print(_red(\"❌ No active task\"))\n            return 2\n    token = _load_token()\n    if not token:\n        print(_red(\"❌ No active task\"))\n        return 2\n\n    # 水位检查\n    try:\n        from lib.water_level import run_water_gate\n        gate = run_water_gate(action=\"tick\")\n        if not gate[\"continue\"]:\n            print(_yellow(f\"⚠  {gate['message']}\"))\n            # Pause: write handoff, request compact\n            from lib.handoff_writer import write_handoff\n            write_handoff(TASK_DIR, token.get(\"session\",{}).get(\"id\",\"\"), token, PLAN_PATH, executor_path=EXECUTOR_PATH)\n            return 0  # soft pause, not error\n        elif gate[\"water\"][\"level\"] == \"warn\":\n            print(_yellow(f\"⚠  {gate['message']}\"))\n    except ImportError:\n        pass  # water_level.py not available — continue without\n\n    # 找当前 pending 步骤 — 从 plan.md 读取\n    current_step = None\n    if PLAN_PATH and PLAN_PATH.exists():\n        plan_content = PLAN_PATH.read_text()\n        pending_steps = re.findall(r\"^- \\[ \\] (\\S+?):\", plan_content, re.MULTILINE)\n        if pending_steps:\n            current_step = pending_steps[0]\n    else:\n        current_step = token.get(\"task\", {}).get(\"current_step\")\n\n    if \"tick\" in token.get(\"stats\", {}):\n        token[\"stats\"][\"tick\"] += 1\n        print(f\"   Tick: {token['stats']['tick']}\")\n    else:\n        token[\"stats\"][\"turns\"] = token[\"stats\"].get(\"turns\", 0) + 1\n        print(f\"   Turn: {token['stats']['turns']}\")\n    _save_token(token)\n\n    # task-state: 记录步骤开始追踪\n    if current_step and tst:\n        tst.mark_step_started(TOKEN_PATH, current_step)\n        print(f\"   ◷ Tracking {current_step} (use 'verify' to complete)\")\n    return 0\n\n\ndef _run_dual_judge(token: dict) -> int:\n    \"\"\"L2 任务 verify 自动双审判：static + runtime oracle → meta 聚合。\n\n    裁决落盘 .omc/state/meta-oracle-verdicts/{task_id}/latest.json。\n    Returns: 0=ACCEPT/ADVISORY（放行）, 2=REJECT（verify 不通过）, 3=ESCALATE（放行但提示人工）。\n    \"\"\"\n    task_id = token.get(\"session\", {}).get(\"id\", \"unknown\")\n    static_agent = _hook_dir / \"static_oracle_agent.py\"\n    runtime_agent = _hook_dir / \"runtime_oracle_agent.py\"\n    meta = _hook_dir / \"meta_oracle.py\"\n    if not (static_agent.exists() and runtime_agent.exists() and meta.exists()):\n        print(_yellow(\"⚠  dual-judge 脚本缺失，跳过（降级为人工复核）\"))\n        return 0\n\n    print(\"⚖️  L2 双审判官裁决（static → runtime → meta）...\")\n    for name, agent in ((\"static\", static_agent), (\"runtime\", runtime_agent)):\n        try:\n            r = subprocess.run(\n                [sys.executable, str(agent), \"review\", \"--task-id\", task_id],\n                capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=120,\n            )\n            if r.returncode not in (0, 1):\n                print(_yellow(f\"⚠  {name} oracle exit={r.returncode}: {r.stderr[:200]}\"))\n        except Exception as exc:\n            print(_yellow(f\"⚠  {name} oracle 异常: {exc}\"))\n\n    try:\n        r = subprocess.run(\n            [sys.executable, str(meta), \"aggregate\", \"--task-id\", task_id],\n            capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=30,\n        )\n        out = r.stdout.strip()\n        verdict = \"UNAVAILABLE\"\n        try:\n            json_start = out.find(\"{\")\n            if json_start >= 0:\n                verdict = json.loads(out[json_start:]).get(\"verdict\", \"UNAVAILABLE\")\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n        _write_audit(\"dual_judge\", {\"task_id\": task_id, \"verdict\": verdict, \"exit\": r.returncode})\n        if verdict == \"REJECT\":\n            print(_red(f\"⚖️  双审判 REJECT — verify 不通过，详见 .omc/state/meta-oracle-verdicts/{task_id}/latest.json\"))\n            return 2\n        if verdict == \"ESCALATE\":\n            print(_yellow(f\"⚖️  双审判 ESCALATE — 建议人工复核\"))\n            return 3\n        print(_green(f\"⚖️  双审判 {verdict}\"))\n        return 0\n    except Exception as exc:\n        print(_yellow(f\"⚠  meta 聚合异常: {exc}（降级放行，需人工复核）\"))\n        return 0\n\n\ndef _run_verify_gate(step_id):\n    \"\"\"Shell out 到 verify_gate.py 裁决 step — 返回 (decision, reason, payload)。\n\n    fail-closed: 脚本缺失/执行异常/输出不可解析 一律 BLOCKED。\n    decision 取自 stdout JSON(exit code 仅辅助: VERIFIED=0, 其余=1)。\n    \"\"\"\n    import subprocess\n    script = Path(__file__).resolve().parent / \"verify_gate.py\"\n    if not script.exists():\n        return \"BLOCKED\", \"verify_gate_missing\", {\n            \"required_action\": \"恢复 .claude/scripts/verify_gate.py 后重跑\"}\n    cmd = [sys.executable, str(script), \"--step\", step_id,\n           \"--plan\", str(PLAN_PATH), \"--executor\", str(EXECUTOR_PATH)]\n    if TOKEN_PATH:\n        cmd += [\"--token\", str(TOKEN_PATH)]\n    spec = (TASK_DIR / \"spec.md\") if TASK_DIR else None\n    if spec and spec.exists():\n        cmd += [\"--spec\", str(spec)]\n    try:\n        r = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=30)\n    except Exception as exc:\n        return \"BLOCKED\", f\"verify_gate_error:{type(exc).__name__}\", {}\n    try:\n        payload = json.loads(r.stdout)\n    except (json.JSONDecodeError, ValueError):\n        return \"BLOCKED\", f\"verify_gate_bad_output:{(r.stdout or r.stderr or '')[:160]}\", {}\n    return payload.get(\"decision\", \"BLOCKED\"), payload.get(\"reason\", \"\"), payload\n\n\ndef cmd_verify(step_id=None):\n    \"\"\"验证 step 完成 — VerifyGate 裁决通过才标记 plan.md [x] + 写 task-bound audit\"\"\"\n    if not TOKEN_PATH or not TOKEN_PATH.exists():\n        token, found_path = _find_latest_token()\n        if token and found_path:\n            _init_paths_from_token(token, found_path)\n        else:\n            print(_red(\"❌ No active task\"))\n            return 2\n    token = _load_token()\n    if not token:\n        print(_red(\"❌ No active task\"))\n        return 2\n\n    if not PLAN_PATH.exists():\n        print(_red(\"❌ plan.md not found\"))\n        return 2\n\n    plan = PLAN_PATH.read_text()\n    lines = plan.split(\"\\n\")\n\n    if step_id:\n        targets = [step_id]\n    else:\n        targets = []\n        current = token.get(\"task\", {}).get(\"current_step\")\n        if current:\n            targets.append(current)\n        if not targets:\n            print(_yellow(\"⚠  All steps already completed\"))\n            return 0\n\n    level = token.get(\"session\", {}).get(\"level\", \"L1_BASE\")\n    verified_any = False\n    for target in targets:\n        # ── VerifyGate 接线（PKG-A）：无证据不 [x]，fail-closed ──\n        decision, reason, gate_payload = _run_verify_gate(target)\n        degraded = False\n        if decision in (\"VERIFIED\", \"WARN\"):\n            pass\n        elif level != \"L2_ENHANCE\" and reason in (\"no_verify_rules\", \"executor_missing\"):\n            # L1 轻量任务无验证契约：允许标记但必须留痕（不产生 VERIFIED，Gate6 不放行）\n            degraded = True\n        else:\n            _write_audit(\"verify\", {\"step\": target, \"result\": decision, \"reason\": reason})\n            print(_red(f\"❌ {target}: VerifyGate {decision} — {reason}\"))\n            required = gate_payload.get(\"required_action\")\n            if required:\n                print(_yellow(f\"   需要: {required}\"))\n            return 2\n        pattern = re.compile(r\"^- \\[ \\] \" + re.escape(target) + r\":\", re.MULTILINE)\n        replacement = f\"- [x] {target}:\"\n        new_plan, count = pattern.subn(replacement, plan)\n        if count > 0:\n            plan = new_plan\n            # 更新 token — 统一新格式（递增 done 计数器）\n            token[\"stats\"][\"done\"] = token[\"stats\"].get(\"done\", 0) + 1\n            if token[\"stats\"][\"done\"] >= token[\"stats\"][\"total\"]:\n                token[\"task\"][\"status\"] = \"completed\"\n            if degraded:\n                _write_audit(\"verify_degraded\", {\"step\": target, \"reason\": reason})\n                print(_yellow(f\"⚠  {target}: {reason} — 降级标记并留痕（非 VERIFIED）\"))\n            else:\n                _write_audit(\"verify\", {\n                    \"step\": target, \"result\": \"VERIFIED\", \"gate\": decision,\n                    \"warnings\": gate_payload.get(\"warnings\", []),\n                })\n                print(_green(f\"✅ {target}: VERIFIED\"))\n            # task-state: 标记完成\n            if tst:\n                tst.mark_step_completed(TOKEN_PATH, target)\n                verdict = tst.format_tick_verdict(TOKEN_PATH, target)\n                if verdict:\n                    print(verdict)\n            verified_any = True\n        else:\n            print(_yellow(f\"⚠  {target}: not found in plan.md\"))\n\n    if verified_any:\n        PLAN_PATH.write_text(plan)\n        _save_token(token)\n        _write_handoff(token)\n\n        # L2 双审判官：verify 自动裁决（REJECT → verify 不通过）\n        level = token.get(\"session\", {}).get(\"level\", \"L1_BASE\")\n        if level == \"L2_ENHANCE\":\n            judge_rc = _run_dual_judge(token)\n            if judge_rc == 2:\n                return 2\n\n        # Goal 状态自动推进: done >= total → VERIFYING\n        done = token.get(\"stats\", {}).get(\"done\", 0)\n        total = token.get(\"stats\", {}).get(\"total\", 0)\n        if done >= total and GoalMachine:\n            try:\n                gm = GoalMachine(TOKEN_PATH)\n                gm.auto_progress(token)\n            except GoalError:\n                pass\n    return 0\n\n\ndef cmd_report(use_stdout=True, archive_mode=False):\n    \"\"\"\n    生成 final-report.md — 共享节点，所有流程的终止点都应调用。\n\n    从 executor.md + plan.md + audit JSONL 提取事实，不会编造。\n\n    Args:\n        use_stdout: 输出到 stdout（默认 True）\n        archive_mode: 归档模式（写入 task_dir + 额外标记）\n\n    Returns:\n        0 = 成功, 1 = 无活跃任务, 2 = 错误\n    \"\"\"\n    if not TOKEN_PATH or not TOKEN_PATH.exists():\n        token, tp = _find_latest_token()\n        if token and tp:\n            _init_paths_from_token(token, tp)\n        else:\n            print(_red(\"❌ No active task\"))\n            return 2\n\n    token = _load_token()\n    if not token:\n        print(_red(\"❌ No active task\"))\n        return 2\n\n    report_text = \"\"\n\n    if carros_utils and hasattr(carros_utils, \"generate_final_report\"):\n        report_text = carros_utils.generate_final_report(token, TASK_DIR)\n    else:\n        # fallback brief\n        now = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime(\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M UTC\")\n        stats = token.get(\"stats\", {})\n        sid = token.get(\"session\", {}).get(\"id\", \"unknown\")\n        report_text = (\n            f\"# Final Report: {sid}\\n\\n\"\n            f\"**生成时间:** {now}\\n\"\n            f\"**状态:** {token.get('status', '?')}\\n\"\n            f\"**完成度:** {stats.get('done', 0)}/{stats.get('total', 0)}\\n\\n\"\n        )\n\n    # 输出到 stdout（用户直接看到）\n    if use_stdout:\n        print(_bold(\"=\" * 50))\n        print(report_text)\n        print(_bold(\"=\" * 50))\n\n    # 输出到 task_dir/final-report.md\n    if TASK_DIR:\n        report_path = TASK_DIR / = lint + verify-summary + final-report + tombstone\"\"\"\n    if not TOKEN_PATH or not TOKEN_PATH.exists():\n        token, found_path = _find_latest_token()\n        if token and found_path:\n            _init_paths_from_token(token, found_path)\n        else:\n            print(_red(\"❌ No active task\"))\n            return 2\n    print(_bold(\"Archiving task...\"))\n\n    # Step 1: run lint — 仅 error (exit>=2) 阻断，warning (exit=1) 可归档\n    if not force:\n        lint_ok = cmd_lint()\n        if lint_ok >= 2:\n            print(_red(\"❌ Lint has errors. Use --force to archive anyway.\"))\n            return 2\n        elif lint_ok == 1:\n            print(_yellow(\"⚠  Lint warnings only — proceeding with archive\"))\n    else:\n        print(_yellow(\"⚠  --force: skipping lint\"))\n\n    token = _load_token()\n    if not token:\n        print(_red(\"❌ No active task\"))\n        return 2\n\n    # Step 2: check all steps completed — 统一新格式\n    if not force:\n        pending = []\n        if token.get(\"stats\", {}).get(\"done\", 0) < token.get(\"stats\", {}).get(\"total\", 0):\n            pending = [\"current_step not completed\"]\n        if pending:\n            print(_red(f\"❌ Steps not completed: {pending}\"))\n            return 2\n    else:\n        print(_yellow(\"⚠  --force: skipping step completion check\"))\n\n    # Step 3: generate final report (shared node)\n    task_sid = token.get(\"session\", {}).get(\"id\", \"unknown\")\n    archive_dir = OMC_ROOT / \"archive\" / task_sid\n    archive_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n    cmd_report(use_stdout=False)\n    print(_green(f\"✅ Final report: {archive_dir / 'final-report.md'}\"))\n\n    # Step 4: 复制 report 到 archive 目录\n    if GoalMachine:\n        try:\n            gm = GoalMachine(TOKEN_PATH)\n            gm.transition(gsm.ARCHIVED, reason=\"archive completed\")\n            print(_green(f\"   Goal State: {gsm.get_state_header(gm.current_state)}\"))\n            # 重新加载 token — GoalMachine 已写入 goal.archived\n            token = _load_token() or token\n        except GoalError:\n            pass\n\n    # Step 5: tombstone — 复制 token 到 archive 目录作为墓碑\n    token[\"status\"] = \"archived\"\n    token[\"archived_at\"] = datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()\n    _save_token(token)\n\n    # 按方案 10.md L987-1000 写 token.final.json + token.tombstone.json\n    import shutil\n    write_json_atomic = lambda p, d: (p.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True), p.write_text(json.dumps(d, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + \"\\n\"))\n    write_json_atomic(archive_dir / \"token.final.json\", token)\n    write_json_atomic(\n        archive_dir / \"token.tombstone.json\",\n        {\n },\n    )\n    for optional in [\"plan.md\", \"executor.md\"]:\n        src = TASK_DIR / optional if TASK_DIR else None\n        if src and src.exists():\n            shutil.copy2(src, archive_dir / \"session-handoff.md\")\n\n    _write_audit(\"archive\", {\"task_id\": token[\"session\"][\"id\"], \"result\": \"ARCHIVED\"})\n    _write_handoff(token)\n\n    # Step 6: 删除 active token\n    token_path_str = str(TOKEN_PATH)\n    TOKEN_PATH.unlink(missing_ok=True)\n    print(_green(f\"✅ Token 已删除: {token_path_str}\"))\n\n    # Step 7: 输出 {\"continue\": false}\n    print(json.dumps({\"continue\": False}))\n    print(_green(\"✅ Task archived\"))\n\n    return 0\n\n\ndef _generate_final_report(token):\n    \"\"\"生成归档报告 — 委托 carros_utils\"\"\"\n    if carros_utils:\n        return carros_utils.generate_final_report(token)\n    # fallback — inline\n    now = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime(\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M UTC\")\n    sid =  done = stats.get(\"done\", 0)\n    total = stats.get(\"total\", 0)\n    tick = stats.get(\"turns\", 0)\n    current = token.get(\"task\", {}).get(\"current_step\", \"?\")\n    task_status = token.get(\"task\", {}).get(\"status\", \"?\")\n    step_lines = [f\"  current_step: {current} ({task_status})\"]\n\n    lines = [\n        f\"# Final Report: {sid}\",\n        \"\",\n        f\"**Archived at:** {now}\",\n        f\"**Level:** {level}\",\n        f\"**Status:** {status}\",\n        \"\",\n        \"## Summary\",\n        \"\",\n        f\"Completed {done}/{total} steps in \"\\n\".join(lines)\n\n\ndef cmd_lint(path=None):\n    \"\"\"统一 lint — 委托 omc_lint 模块\"\"\"\n    if omc_lint is None:\n        print(_red(\"❌ omc_lint module not available\"))\n        return 2\n\n    target = path or str(PROJECT_ROOT)\n    try:\n        result = omc_lint.run_lint(target)\n        print(result[\"output\"])\n        return result[\"exit_code\"]\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(_red(f\"❌ Lint error: {e}\"))\n        return 2\n\n\nBENCH_SCENES = {\n    \"01_doc_update\": {\n        \"description\": \"纯文档更新\",\n        \"steps\": [\"S1\"],\n    },\n    \"02_single_file_fix\": {\n        \"description\": \"单文件修复\",\n        \"steps\": [\"S1\"],\n    },\n    \"03_multi_file_test\": {\n        \"description\": \"多文件协同修改\",\n        \"steps\": [\"S1\", \"07_archive\": {\n        \"description\": \"归档闭环\",\n        \"steps\": [\"S1\", \"S2\", \"S3\", \"S4\", \"S5\"],\n    },\n}\n\n\ndef cmd_bench(scene=None):\n    \"\"\"运行 bench 基准测试—验证治理系统基本链路\"\"\"\n    import subprocess\n\n    scenes = BENCH_SCENES\n    if scene:\n        if scene not in scenes:\n            print(_red(f\"❌ Unknown bench scene: {scene}\"))\n            print(f\"   Available: {', '.join(scenes.keys())}\")\n            return 2\n        scenes = {scene: scenes[scene]}\n\n    results = []\n    for scene_id, cfg in scenes.items():\n        print(_bold(f\"\\n{'='*60}\"))\n        print(_bold(f\"▶ Bench: {scene_id} — {cfg['description']}\"))\n        print(f\"{'='*60}\")\n\n        task_id = f\"bench-{scene_id[:2]}\"\n        steps = cfg[\"steps\"]\n\n        # 1. init\n        step_args = \" \".join(f\"--step {s}\" for s in steps)\n        cmd = f\"python3 .claude/scripts/carros_base.py init --task-id {task_id} {step_args} --force\"\n        print(_yellow(f\"    init...\"))\n        r = subprocess.run(cmd, shell=True, capture_output=True, text=True, cwd=PROJECT_ROOT)\n        if r.returncode != 0:\n            print(_red(f\"    ❌ init failed: {r.stderr[:200]}\"))\n            results.append((scene_id, \"FAIL_INIT\"))\n            continue\n\n        # 2. status\n        r = subprocess.run(\"python3 .claude/scripts/carros_base.py status\", shell=True,\n                          capture_output=True, text=True, cwd=PROJECT_ROOT)\n        if r.returncode != 0:\n            print(_red(f\"    ❌ status failed\"))\n            results.append((scene_id, \"FAIL_STATUS\"))\n            continue\n        print(f\"    {r.stdout.strip().split(chr(10))[0]}\")\n\n        # 3. tick\n        r = subprocess.run(\"python3 .claude/scripts/carros_base.py tick\", shell=True,\n                          capture_output=True, text=True, cwd=PROJECT_ROOT)\n        if r.returncode != 0:\n            print(_yellow(f\"    ⚠ tick failed\"))\n\n        # 4. verify each step\n        all_verified = True\n        for s in steps:\n            r = subprocess.run(f\"python3 .claude/scripts/carros_base.py verify --step {s}\",\n                              shell=True, capture_output=True, text=True, cwd=PROJECT_ROOT)\n            if r.returncode == 0:\n                print(f\"    ✅ {s}: VERIFIED\")\n            else:\n                print(_red(f\"    ❌ {s}: {r.stdout[:100]}\"))\n                all_verified = False\n\n        if not all_verified:\n            results.append((scene_id, \"FAIL_VERIFY\"))\n            continue\n\n        # 5. lint\n        r = subprocess.run(\"python3 .claude/scripts/carros_base.py lint\", shell=True,\n                          capture_output=True, text=True, cwd=PROJECT_ROOT)\n        lint_ok = r.returncode == 0\n        if lint_ok:\n            print(f\"    ✅ lint: PASS\")\n        else:\n            print(_yellow(f\"    ⚠ lint: {r.stdout.strip()[:100]}\"))\n\n        # 6. archive\n        r = subprocess.run(\"python3 .claude/scripts/carros_base.py archive --force\", shell=True,\n                          capture_output=True, text=True, cwd=PROJECT_ROOT)\n        if r.returncode == 0:\n            print(_green(f\"    ✅ archive: OK\"))\n            results.append((scene_id, \"PASS\"))\n        else:\n            print(_red(f\"    ❌ archive: {r.stdout[:200]}\"))\n            results.append((scene_id, \"FAIL_ARCHIVE\"))\n\n    # Summary\n    print(_bold(f\"\\n{'='*60}\"))\n    print(_bold(\"Bench Results\"))\n    print(f\"{'='*60}\")\n    passed = sum(1 for _, s in results if s == \"PASS\")\n    failed = sum(1 for _, s in results if s != \"PASS\")\n    for scene_id, status in results:\n        icon = _green(\"✅\") if status == \"PASS\" else _red(\"❌\")\n        print(f\"  {icon} {scene_id}: {status}\")\n    print(f\"\\n  {passed} passed, {failed} failed\")\n    return 0 if failed == 0 else 1\n\n\ndef cmd_gate():\n    \"\"\"PreActionGate - 对 action_spec 做执行前安全裁决\n\n    读取当前 active token，创建临时 action_spec 文件，\n    调用 pre_action_gate.py 做裁决。\n\n    用法:\n        python3 .omc/scripts/carros_base.py gate --action-type write_file --paths README.md --step S1 --intent \"update docs\"\n    \"\"\"\n    import subprocess\n    import tempfile\n\n    argv = sys.argv[sys.argv.index(\"gate\") + 1:]\n    p = {}\n    i = 0\n    while i < len(argv):\n        if argv[i] == \"--action-type\" and i + 1 < len(argv):\n            p[\"action_type\"] = argv[i + 1]; i += 2\n        elif argv[i] == \"--command\" and i + 1 < len(argv):\n            p[\"command\"] = argv[i + 1]; i += 2\n        elif argv[i] == \"--paths\" and i + 1 < len(argv):\n            p[\"paths\"] = argv[i + 1].split(\",\"); i += 2\n        elif argv[i] == \"--step\" and i + 1 < len(argv):\n            p[\"current_step\"] = argv[i + 1]; i += 2\n        elif argv[i] == \"--intent\" and i + 1 < len(argv):\n            p[\"intent\"] = argv[i + 1]; i += 2\n        elif argv[i] == \"--risk-hint\" and i + 1 < len(argv):\n            p[\"risk_hint\"] = argv[i + 1]; i += 2\n        elif argv[i] == \"--network\" and i + 1 < len(argv):\n            p[\"requires_network\"] = argv[i + 1].lower() in (\"true\", \"1\", \"yes\"); i += 2\n        elif argv[i] == \"--production\" and i + 1 < len(argv):\n            p[\"requires_production\"] = argv[i + 1].lower() in (\"true\", \"1\", \"yes\"); i += 2\n        elif argv[i] == \"--database\" and i + 1 < len(argv):\n            p[\"requires_database\"] = argv[i + 1].lower() in (\"true\", \"1\", \"yes\"); i += 2\n        else:\n            i += 1\n\n    if \"action_type\" not in p:\n        print(_red(\"Missing --action-type\"))\n        return 2\n\n    p.setdefault(\"paths\", [])\n    p.setdefault(\"intent\", \"\")\n    p.setdefault(\"current_step\", \"S1\")\n\n    spec_file = tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(\n        mode=\"w\", suffix=\".json\", delete=False, prefix=\"preaction-\"\n    )\n    json.dump(p, spec_file, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)\n    spec_path = spec_file.name\n    spec_file.close()\n\n    # 找到当前 active token\n    _token_data, token_path = _find_latest_token()\n    if token_path is None:\n        print(_yellow(\"No active token found — running without token context\"))\n        token_arg = []\n    else:\n        token_arg = [\"--token\", str(token_path)]\n\n    try:\n        gate_script = _hook_dir / \"pre_action_gate.py\"\n        cmd = [sys.executable, str(gate_script), spec_path] + token_arg\n        r = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True)\n        output = r.stdout.strip() if r.stdout else r.stderr.strip()\n        if output:\n            print(output)\n        return r.returncode\n    finally:\n        Path(spec_path).unlink(missing_ok=True)\n\n\ndef _sub_token(task_dir: str, parent_id: str, step_id: str, plan_text: str = \"\") -> dict:\n    \"\"\"生成 subagent token.json — 子代理的启动契约\n\n    subagent 读这个文件知道：为谁工作（parent_id）、\n    要做什么（subtask.plan）、被允许做什么（session.level）\n    \"\"\"\n    now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)\n    return {\n        \"schema_version\": _SCHEMA_VERSION,\n        \"session\": {\n            \"id\": f\"{parent_id}-{step_id}\",\n            \"level\": \"L1_SUB\",\n            \"created_at\": now.isoformat(),\n            \"updated_at\": now.isoformat(),\n        },\n        \"parent\": {\n            \"task_dir\": task_dir,\n            \"task_id\": parent_id,\n            \"step_id\": step_id,\n        },\n        \"subtask\": {\n            \"plan\": plan_text,\n        },\n        \"status\": \"active\",\n        \"stats\": {\"done\": 0, \"total\": 1, \"tick\": 0},\n    }\n\n\ndef _result_template() -> dict:\n    \"\"\"result.json 模板 — subagent 完成工作后写\"\"\"\n    return {\n        \"status\": \"running\",\n        \"summary\": \"\",\n        \"evidence\": [],\n        \"files_changed\": [],\n        \"failure\": None,\n        \"completed_at\": None,\n        \"started_at\": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),\n    }\n\n\ndef cmd_dispatch():\n    \"\"\"分发子任务到 subagent — 创建 sub_task/{step} 目录 + token + plan\n\n    用法:\n        python3 .claude/scripts/carros_base.py dispatch --step S1 [--text \\\"要做什么\\\"]\n\n    产生文件:\n        .omc/tasks/{date}/{task}/sub_task/sub-{step}/\n            token.json     — subagent 契约（parent/plan/约束）\n            result.json    — subagent 汇报模板\n            executor.md    — 空证据账本\n\n    subagent 启动后工作:\n        1. 读 token.json（知道 parent_task 和 plan）\n        2. 按 plan 执行\n        3. 写 executor.md（证据）\n        4. 更新 result.json（status=completed + summary + evidence）\n        5. 更新 token.json（status=completed）\n    \"\"\"\n    global TASK_DIR, TOKEN_PATH, SUB_TASK_DIR\n\n    # 确保有 active token\n    if not TOKEN_PATH or not TOKEN_PATH.exists():\n        token, tp = _find_latest_token()\n        if not token:\n            print(_red(\"❌ No active main task. Run 'init' first.\"))\n            return 2\n        _init_paths_from_token(token, tp)\n\n    # 解析参数\n    argv = sys.argv[sys.argv.index(\"dispatch\") + 1:]\n    step_id = \"S1\"\n    plan_text = \"\"\n    i = 0\n    while i < len(argv):\n        if argv[i] == \"--step\" and i + 1 < len(argv):\n            step_id = argv[i + 1]; i += 2\n        elif argv[i] == \"--text\" and i + 1 < len(argv):\n            plan_text = argv[i + 1]; i += 2\n        else:\n            i += 1\n\n    # 创建 sub_task 目录\n    sub_dir = SUB_TASK_DIR / f\"sub-{step_id}\"\n    sub_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n\n    # 生成 subagent token\n    token_data = _sub_token(\n        task_dir=str(TASK_DIR),\n        parent_id=token.get(\"session\", {}).get(\"id\", \"unknown\"),\n        step_id=step_id,\n        plan_text=plan_text,\n    )\n\n    # 写入 token.json\n    token_path = sub_dir / \"token.json\"\n    token_path.write_text(json.dumps(token_data, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))\n\n    # 写入 result.json（模板）\n    result_data = _result_template()\n    result_data[\"parent\"] = {\n        \"task_dir\": str(TASK_DIR),\n        \"token_path\": str(TOKEN_PATH),\n    }\n    result_path = sub_dir / \"result.json\"\n    result_path.write_text(json.dumps(result_data, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))\n\n    # 写入 executor.md（空账本）\n    exec_path = sub_dir / \"executor.md\"\n    if not exec_path.exists():\n        exec_path.write_text(\n            f\"# Executor: {token_data['session']['id']}\\n\"\n            f\"## Parent: {token_data['parent']['task_id']}\\n\\n\"\n        )\n\n    # 更新 main token：记录该 step 已分配 subagent\n    main_token = _load_token()\n    if main_token and \"steps\" in main_token:\n        for s in main_token[\"steps\"]:\n            if s[\"id\"] == step_id:\n                s[\"status\"] = \"running\"\n                s[\"subagent_path\"] = str(sub_dir)\n                break\n        _save_token(main_token)\n\n    print(_green(f\"✅ Dispatched {step_id} → {sub_dir}\"))\n    print(f\"   token:  {token_path}\")\n    print(f\"   result: {result_path}\")\n    print(f\"   Subagent reads token.json for task, writes result.json on completion\")\n    return 0\n\n\ndef cmd_poll():\n    \"\"\"轮询所有 subagent 状态 — main agent 追踪 subagent 进度\n\n    读每个 sub_task/sub-*/result.json，展示汇总状态。\n    支持 --verbose 展示每个 subagent 的关键证据。\n\n    用法:\n        python3 .claude/scripts/carros_base.py poll [--verbose]\n    \"\"\"\n    global SUB_TASK_DIR, TASK_DIR\n\n    if not SUB_TASK_DIR or not SUB_TASK_DIR.exists():\n        # 尝试从当前 token 获取\n        tok, _ = _find_latest_token()\n        if tok:\n            td = tok.get(\"task_dir\")\n            if td:\n                SUB_TASK_DIR = Path(td) / \"sub_task\"\n        if not SUB_TASK_DIR or not SUB_TASK_DIR.exists():\n            print(_yellow(\"⚠  No sub tasks found\"))\n            return 0\n\n    verbose = \"--verbose\" in sys.argv\n\n    sub_dirs = sorted([d for d in SUB_TASK_DIR.iterdir() if d.is_dir()])\n    if not sub_dirs:\n        print(_yellow(\"⚠  No sub tasks found\"))\n        return 0\n\n    print(_bold(f\"SubAgent Status: {len(sub_dirs)} task(s)\"))\n    print(f\"{'─' * 50}\")\n\n    total_done = 0\n    total_failed = 0\n    for sd in sub_dirs:\n        name = sd.name\n        result_path = sd / \"result.json\"\n        token_path = sd / \"token.json\"\n\n        if not result_path.exists():\n            print(f\"   ○ {name}: no result yet\")\n            continue\n\n        try:\n            result = json.loads(result_path.read_text())\n            status = result.get(\"status\", \"unknown\")\n\n            if status == \"completed\":\n                icon = _green(\"✔\")\n                total_done += 1\n            elif status == \"failed\":\n                icon = _red(\"✘\")\n                total_failed += 1\n            elif status == \"running\":\n                icon = _yellow(\"◷\")\n            else:\n                icon = \"○\"\n\n            summary = result.get(\"summary\", \"\")\n            parts = [f\"   {icon} {name}: {status}\"]\n            if summary:\n                parts.append(f\"→ {summary[:60]}\")\n            if verbose and result.get(\"files_changed\"):\n                parts.append(f\"files: {', '.join(result['files_changed'][:3])}\")\n            if result.get(\"failure\"):\n                parts.append(_red(f\"FAIL: {result['failure'][:80]}\"))\n\n            print(\"  \".join(parts))\n\n        except (json.JSONDecodeError, OSError) as e:\n            print(f\"   ⚠ {name}: read error ({e})\")\n\n    print(f\"{'─' * 50}\")\n    print(f\"   {total_done} completed, {total_failed} failed, \"\n          f\"{len(sub_dirs) - total_done - total_failed} running/pending\")\n\n    # 更新 main token 的 step 状态\n    main_token = _load_token()\n    if main_token and \"steps\" in main_token:\n        updated = False\n        for s in main_token[\"steps\"]:\n            sp = s.get(\"subagent_path\")\n            if sp and s[\"status\"] == \"running\":\n                rp = Path(sp) / \"result.json\"\n                if rp.exists():\n                    try:\n                        r = json.loads(rp.read_text())\n                        if r.get(\"status\") == \"completed\":\n                            s[\"status\"] = \"completed\"\n                            updated = True\n                        elif r.get(\"status\") == \"failed\":\n                            s[\"status\"] = \"failed\"\n                            updated = True\n                    except Exception:\n                        pass\n        if updated:\n            _save_token(main_token)\n\n    return 0\n\n\ndef cmd_collect():\n    \"\"\"回收 subagent 完成结果 — 把 result.json 汇入 main task executor.md\n\n    用法:\n        python3 .claude/scripts/carros_base.py collect --step S1\n\n    执行:\n        1. 读 sub_task/sub-{step}/result.json\n        2. 验证 status=completed\n        3. 证据追加到 main executor.md\n        4. 文件变更记录到 audit\n        5. 标记 main token step 完成\n    \"\"\"\n    global SUB_TASK_DIR, TASK_DIR, TOKEN_PATH, EXECUTOR_PATH\n\n    argv = sys.argv[sys.argv.index(\"collect\") + 1:]\n    step_id = None\n    i = 0\n    while i < len(argv):\n        if argv[i] == \"--step\" and i + 1 < len(argv):\n            step_id = argv[i + 1]; i += 2\n        else:\n            i += 1\n\n    if not step_id:\n        print(_red(\"❌ Usage: collect --step S1\"))\n        return 2\n\n    # 找 sub task 目录\n    if not SUB_TASK_DIR or not SUB_TASK_DIR.exists():\n        tok, tp = _find_latest_token()\n        if tok:\n            td = tok.get(\"task_dir\")\n            if td:\n reported\"))\n        return 2\n\n    try:\n        result = json.loads(result_path.read_text())\n    except (json.JSONDecodeError, OSError) as e:\n        print(_red(f\"❌ Failed to read result.json: {result.get('failure', 'unknown')}\")\n        return 2 if \"--force\" not in sys.argv else 0\n    elif status != \"completed\":\n        print(_yellow(f\"⚠  {step_id} is still {status}\"))\n\n    # 证据追加到 main executor.md\n    if EXECUTOR_PATH:\n        ev_lines = [\n            f\"\\n### SubAgent {step_id} — collected at {datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()}\",\n            f\"- source: sub_task/sub-{step_id}\",\n        ]\n        if result.get(\"summary\"):\n            ev_lines.append(f\"- summary: {result['summary']}\")\n        if result.get(\"evidence\"):\n            for ev in result[\"evidence\"][:5]:\n                ev_lines.append(f\"- evidence: {ev[:100]}\")\n        if result.get(\"files_changed\"):\n            for f in result[\"files_changed\"][:10]:\n isinstance(EXECUTOR_PATH, (str, Path)) else EXECUTOR_PATH\n        if isinstance(exec_path, Path) and exec_path.exists():\n            with exec_path.open(\"a\") as f:\n                f.write(\"\\n\".join(ev_lines) + \"\\n\")\n        else:\n            # 可能还没创建 executor.md\n            pass\n\n    # 标记 main token 完成\n    main_token = _load_token()\n    if main_token and \"steps\"       \"step\": step_id,\n        \"status\": status,\n        \"evidence_count\": len(result.get(\"evidence\", [])),\n        \"files_changed\": len(result.get(\"files_changed\", [])),\n    }, fallback=True)\n\n    print(_green(f\"✅ {step_id}: collected and verified\"))\n    summary = result.get(\"summary\", \"\")\n    if summary:\n        print(f\"   {summary}\")\n    return 0\n\n\ndef cmd_cancel():\n    \"\"\"中止 subagent 任务\n\n    用法:\n        python3 .claude/scripts/carros_base.py cancel --step S1 [--reason \\\"changes not needed\\\"]\n\n    将 sub_task/sub-{step}/result.json
